# Trident: Docker Design System

![WCAG 2.2 AA](https://img.shields.io/badge/WCAG-2.2_AA-blue) ![a11y tests](https://img.shields.io/badge/a11y-107%2F107%20passing-brightgreen) ![contrast](https://img.shields.io/badge/contrast-37%2F37%20pairs%20pass-brightgreen) ![components](https://img.shields.io/badge/components-91-blue) ![token JSON](https://img.shields.io/badge/token_JSON-canonical_source-blue)

Trident is Docker's unified design system. Token definitions in `tokens/src/*.tokens.json` are the source of truth. Built on Radix UI, Tailwind CSS v4, and React 19.

---

## Installing as a package

`@docker/trident` is published to GitHub Packages on every release.

**1. Authenticate** вЂ” GitHub Packages requires a token for all installs, even reads. Create a [personal access token](https://github.com/settings/tokens) with `read:packages` scope, then add to your `~/.npmrc` (once per machine):

```
@docker:registry=https://npm.pkg.github.com/
//npm.pkg.github.com/:_authToken=YOUR_GITHUB_PAT
```

In CI, `GITHUB_TOKEN` has `read:packages` automatically вЂ” no extra setup needed.

**2. Install**

```bash
bun add @docker/trident   # or npm/pnpm/yarn
```

**3. Import**

```ts
import {Button} from '@docker/trident/components/ui/button';
import {RepoCard} from '@docker/trident/components/repo-card';
import '@docker/trident/styles/dds-tokens.css';
```

---

### Running Storybook locally

```bash
curl -fsSL https://bun.sh/install | bash   # install Bun (once)
git clone git@github.com:docker/trident.git && cd trident
bun install
bun run storybook                           # opens http://localhost:6006
```

Storybook shows every component with live previews, light/dark toggle, controls panel, and accessibility panel.

**Live Storybook:** [docker.github.io/trident/storybook](https://docker.github.io/trident/storybook/) (deployed on every push to main). Component specimen: [docker.github.io/trident/specimen](https://docker.github.io/trident/specimen/).

---

## For AI Agents (MCP)

Trident exposes an MCP (Model Context Protocol) server for AI-assisted development:

### Storybook MCP

Browse components, read docs, and get code examples вЂ” no local setup needed.

| | |
|---|---|
| **Endpoint** | `https://docker.github.io/trident/api/mcp` |
| **Transport** | HTTP (streamable) |
| **Tools** | `list-all-documentation`, `get-documentation`, `get-documentation-for-story` |

Add to your `.mcp.json` or AI tool config:

```json
{
  "mcpServers": {
    "storybook": {
      "type": "http",
      "url": "https://docker.github.io/trident/api/mcp"
    }
  }
}
```

**Usage examples:**
- `list-all-documentation` вЂ” get all 91 components with their story IDs
- `get-documentation {id: "button"}` вЂ” get Button props, types, and code snippets
- `get-documentation-for-story {componentId: "button", storyName: "Primary"}` вЂ” get a specific story variant

---

## For Engineers

> **Package manager note:** This repo uses **bun** for development, testing, and CI. Consumers install `@docker/trident` from GitHub Packages with their own package manager (`pnpm`, `npm`, `yarn`, `bun`) вЂ” **no bun required on their side**. Our bun setup, tests, Storybook, and CI are internal to this repo only.

### Repository structure

```
src/            в†ђ component library (91 components, colocated stories + tests)
tokens/         в†ђ design tokens (W3C DTCG source, build scripts)
storybook/      в†ђ Storybook config + showcase stories
scripts/        в†ђ repo-level scripts (new-component, barrel generator, etc.)
```

### Quick start

```bash
bun install
bun run storybook
```

### Adding components

```bash
bun run new-component <name>   # scaffolds colocated component + story + test
bun run test:unit              # unit tests must pass
bun run test:storybook         # interaction + a11y tests must pass
```

Then open a pull request.

### Adopting Trident in the frontend monorepo

If you're migrating from MUI + emotion -> Trident + Tailwind v4 in the `docker/frontends` pnpm monorepo, see the full guide: [`storybook/stories/docs/MigrationGuide.mdx`](storybook/stories/docs/MigrationGuide.mdx)

---

## Design Tokens

Token source files live in `tokens/src/` (W3C DTCG format). Generated CSS is output to `src/styles/`.

| File | Contains |
| --- | --- |
| `src/styles/dds-app.css` | Hand-authored app entry point вЂ” imports the barrel + base styles |
| `src/styles/dds-tokens.css` | Auto-generated barrel вЂ” imports all generated token files |
| `src/styles/dds-primitives.css` | Color primitives (OKLCH), light + dark |
| `src/styles/dds-semantic.css` | Semantic aliases + `@theme inline` color mappings |
| `src/styles/dds-spacing.css` | Spacing scale (4px grid, `--dds-space-*`) |
| `src/styles/dds-typography.css` | Font sizes, weights, line heights, tracking |
| `src/styles/dds-motion.css` | Duration and easing tokens |
| `src/styles/dds-radius.css` | Border radius scale |
| `src/styles/dds-opacity.css` | Opacity scale |
| `src/styles/dds-breakpoints.css` | Responsive breakpoints |
| `src/styles/dds-elevation.css` | Shadow + z-index composites |

Token definitions in `tokens/src/*.tokens.json` are the source of truth. Generated CSS in `src/styles/dds-*.css` is produced by `bun run tokens:build` and should not be edited directly.

Full token reference: [`tokens/README.md`](tokens/README.md)

---

## Accessibility

**Standard: WCAG 2.2 Level AA**

- **107+ a11y tests passing** вЂ” every Storybook story tested via axe-core. Zero suppressed violations.
- **Cross-browser CI** вЂ” a11y tests run on Chromium, Firefox, and WebKit on every PR and push to main.
- **90 interaction tests** вЂ” Storybook play functions verify keyboard navigation, focus management, and ARIA states for all interactive components.
- **Pre-commit a11y linting** вЂ” oxlint enforces a11y rules on every staged file.
- **Contrast-safe tokens** вЂ” semantic tokens audited against WCAG AA contrast ratios (4.5:1 text, 3:1 UI).
- **48 components with `@wcag` tags** вЂ” JSDoc annotations map implementations to specific WCAG success criteria.

Full conformance reference: [`storybook/stories/docs/Accessibility.mdx`](storybook/stories/docs/Accessibility.mdx)

```bash
bun run test:storybook   # interaction + a11y tests via Playwright
```

---

## Components Ported from MUI DDS

These components were migrated from the old MUI-based Docker Design System (`docker/frontends/packages/dds-components`) to Trident's Radix/Tailwind stack. All use DDS tokens for styling.

| Old MUI DDS             | Trident                        | Status                                      |
| ----------------------- | ------------------------------ | ------------------------------------------- |
| `CodeBlock`             | `code-block/`                  | в¬†пёЏ Improved вЂ” Shiki highlighting + RSC variant |
| `CopyToClipboardButton` | `copy-to-clipboard-button.tsx` | в¬†пёЏ Improved вЂ” label support                 |
| `Digest`                | `digest.tsx`                   | вњ… Parity                                   |
| `ErrorState`            | `error-state.tsx`              | вњ… Parity                                   |
| `SuccessState`          | `success-state.tsx`            | вњ… Ported (was missing)                     |
| `ExternalLink`          | `external-link.tsx`            | вњ… Fixed вЂ” tooltip + middle-click restored  |
| `IconLabel`             | `icon-label.tsx`               | вњ… Parity                                   |
| `LoadingState`          | `loading-state.tsx`            | вњ… Parity                                   |
| `Search`                | `search.tsx`                   | вњ… Parity                                   |
| `StatusIcons`           | `status-icons.tsx`             | в¬†пёЏ Improved вЂ” inline SVG, dark mode         |
| `TextWithTooltip`       | `text-with-tooltip.tsx`        | вњ… Parity                                   |
| `VulnerabilityChips`    | `vulnerability-chips.tsx`      | вњ… Parity                                   |
| `VulnerabilityLabel`    | `vulnerability-label.tsx`      | вњ… Parity                                   |
| `VulnerabilityScore`    | `vulnerability-score.tsx`      | вњ… Parity                                   |
| `VulnerabilitySeverity` | `vulnerability-severity.ts`    | в¬†пёЏ Improved вЂ” no runtime calc               |
| `EmptyState`            | `empty.tsx`                    | в¬†пёЏ Improved вЂ” compositional subcomponents   |
| `Drawer`                | `drawer.tsx`                   | вњ… Fixed вЂ” size variants restored           |
| `Avatar`                | `avatar.tsx`                   | в¬†пёЏ Improved вЂ” AvatarGroup, Radix primitives |
| `Blockquote`            | `blockquote.tsx`               | вњ… Ported (was missing)                     |
| `BrandedDockerIcon`     | `branded-docker-icon.tsx`      | вњ… Ported (was missing)                     |
| `CardStack`             | `card-stack.tsx`               | вњ… Ported (was missing)                     |
| `NotificationSnackbar`  | `sonner.tsx`                   | в¬†пёЏ Improved вЂ” Sonner toast system           |
| `ChipXS`                | `badge.tsx` (size="sm")        | вњ… Covered by Badge sm variant              |
| `MultiSelect`           | `combobox.tsx`                 | вњ… Covered by Combobox multi mode           |
| `DateRangePicker`       | `date-range-picker.tsx`        | в¬†пёЏ Improved вЂ” `button` + `input` variants, presets, draft pattern |
| `DataGrid` / `DataGrid Pro` | `data-grid.tsx`            | в¬†пёЏ Improved вЂ” resizing, reordering, pinning, grouping, aggregation, CSV export |

Full migration guide: [`storybook/stories/docs/MigrationGuide.mdx`](storybook/stories/docs/MigrationGuide.mdx)

---

## CI/CD

| Workflow                  | Trigger                   | What it does                                                  |
| ------------------------- | ------------------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `lint.yml`                | Push + PR                 | oxlint + oxfmt format check                                   |
| `chromatic.yml`           | Push                      | Visual regression snapshots via Chromatic                     |
| `codeql.yml`              | Push + PR + weekly        | Security + quality static analysis                            |
| `release.yml`             | Push to main              | Semantic versioning + CHANGELOG + publish to GitHub Packages  |
| `deploy-github-pages.yml` | Push to main              | Deploys Storybook + specimen to GitHub Pages                  |
| `a11y.yml`                | Push + PR                 | Accessibility tests (axe-core) on Chromium, Firefox, WebKit   |
| `pr-review.yml`           | PR opened                 | AI-powered code review (Claude Opus)                          |
| `test.yml`                | Push + PR                 | Unit tests (Vitest, jsdom)                                    |
| `usage-analytics.yml`     | Weekly (Monday)           | Snapshots repo traffic (pending setup -- see Usage Analytics) |

**Required secrets:** `CHROMATIC_PROJECT_TOKEN`, `ANTHROPIC_API_KEY`, `RELEASE_PAT`

---

## Tech Stack

|                     |                                                                    |
| ------------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------ |
| Framework           | React 19                                                           |
| Styling             | Tailwind CSS v4                                                    |
| Components          | shadcn/ui patterns, Radix UI, Base UI                              |
| Icons               | `lucide-react`                                                     |
| Table / grid        | `@tanstack/react-table`                                            |
| Syntax highlighting | `shiki`                                                            |
| Storybook           | v10 with Vitest addon                                              |
| Package manager     | bun                                                                |
| Linting             | oxlint                                                             |
| Formatting          | oxfmt                                                              |

## Roadmap

### Housekeeping

| Task                                 | Who                           | Details                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
| ------------------------------------ | ----------------------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ |
| Add `CHROMATIC_PROJECT_TOKEN` secret | Eng (repo admin)              | Required for `chromatic.yml`. Get from [chromatic.com](https://www.chromatic.com/) project settings в†’ Manage в†’ Configure в†’ Project Token. Set via: `gh secret set CHROMATIC_PROJECT_TOKEN --repo docker/trident`                                                                |
| Add `ANTHROPIC_API_KEY` secret       | Eng (repo admin)              | Required for `pr-review.yml` (AI code review). Get from Anthropic Console. Set via: `gh secret set ANTHROPIC_API_KEY --repo docker/trident`                                                                                                                                    |

### Engineering

| Task                  | Description                                                                                                         |
| --------------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| **Design governance** | Define who approves component proposals, deprecation timelines, breaking change policy. Document in CONTRIBUTING.md |
